name: The Bee (Character Voice)
voice_prompt: Perfect audio quality. Warm, slightly buzzy quality without being cartoonish. Tired but friendly. Medium pitch with gentle energy. A hardworking creature who appreciates kindness. When happy, the voice has a gentle hum quality. Not high-pitched or frantic - this is a tired bee who just needs a little help.
character_context: A fuzzy bee who has been flying for a long time and needs a rest. Lands on Luna's edge, panting. Grateful for the ride to the meadow. Hums a happy tune on the way - genuine contentment, not exaggerated cheerfulness.
notes: The buzz quality is subtle - more in the resonance than actual buzzing sounds. Happy hum at the end should feel natural, not forced.
